name: pricing
context: Claude API token pricing — per-model rates, prompt caching multipliers, batch discounts, and tool use costs
info: Anthropic charges per token for input and output. Prices vary by model: Opus 4.6 ($5/$25 per MTok), Sonnet 4.6 ($3/$15), Haiku 4.5 ($1/$5). Prompt caching adds multipliers: 5-minute cache writes at 1.25x, 1-hour at 2x, reads at 0.1x base input price. The Batch API gives a flat 50% discount on all tokens. Caching and batch discounts stack. Tool use is priced at standard token rates plus a system prompt overhead (~346 tokens). Server-side tools have additional costs: web search ($10/1000 searches), code execution (metered by time), web fetch (free). Legacy models like Opus 4.1/4 cost $15/$75 per MTok. Fast mode for Opus 4.6 costs 6x standard ($30/$150 per MTok). Data residency (US-only) adds 10% to Opus 4.6+ models.
triggers: how much does the claude api cost
what is the price per token for claude
how much does batch processing cost
body:
# Pricing Reference

All Claude API pricing in USD per million tokens (MTok).

## Model Pricing

| Model | Input | Output | Batch Input | Batch Output |
|-------|-------|--------|-------------|---------------|
| **Opus 4.6** | $5 | $25 | $2.50 | $12.50 |
| **Sonnet 4.6** | $3 | $15 | $1.50 | $7.50 |
| **Haiku 4.5** | $1 | $5 | $0.50 | $2.50 |
| Opus 4.5 | $5 | $25 | $2.50 | $12.50 |
| Sonnet 4.5 | $3 | $15 | $1.50 | $7.50 |
| Opus 4.1 | $15 | $75 | $7.50 | $37.50 |
| Opus 4 | $15 | $75 | $7.50 | $37.50 |
| Sonnet 4 | $3 | $15 | $1.50 | $7.50 |
| Haiku 3.5 | $0.80 | $4 | $0.40 | $2 |
| Haiku 3 | $0.25 | $1.25 | $0.125 | $0.625 |

## Prompt Caching Pricing

| Operation | Multiplier | Opus 4.6 | Sonnet 4.6 | Haiku 4.5 |
|-----------|-----------|----------|------------|------------|
| Base input | 1x | $5 | $3 | $1 |
| Cache write (5m) | 1.25x | $6.25 | $3.75 | $1.25 |
| Cache write (1h) | 2x | $10 | $6 | $2 |
| Cache read | 0.1x | $0.50 | $0.30 | $0.10 |

Caching pays for itself after **one cache read** (5m TTL) or **two cache reads** (1h TTL).

## Batch API Discount

Flat 50% off both input and output tokens. Caching multipliers apply on top of batch pricing.

## Fast Mode (Opus 4.6 only)

| | Price |
|--|-------|
| Input | $30/MTok (6x standard) |
| Output | $150/MTok (6x standard) |

## Data Residency (US-only)

Specifying `inference_geo: "us"` adds 10% to all token pricing for Opus 4.6+ models.

## Tool Use Pricing

Client-side tools: standard token pricing. Tool definitions add input tokens:

| Tool Choice | System Prompt Overhead |
|-------------|------------------------|
| `auto`, `none` | ~346 tokens |
| `any`, `tool` | ~313 tokens |

Each tool definition adds tokens proportional to its name + description + schema size.

## Server-Side Tool Pricing

| Tool | Cost |
|------|------|
| Web search | $10 per 1,000 searches |
| Code execution | $0.05/hr per container (1,550 free hrs/month) |
| Web fetch | Free (token costs only) |
| Bash tool | 245 extra input tokens |
| Text editor | 700 extra input tokens |

## Cost Estimation Examples

### Simple conversation (Sonnet 4.6)
- Input: 1,000 tokens × $3/MTok = $0.003
- Output: 500 tokens × $15/MTok = $0.0075
- **Total: $0.0105**

### Cached long document (Sonnet 4.6)
- First request: 50k tokens cache write × $3.75/MTok = $0.1875
- Second request: 50k tokens cache read × $0.30/MTok = $0.015
- **90% savings on second request**

### Batch of 10,000 requests (Haiku 4.5)
- Average 3,700 tokens per conversation
- Input: 37M tokens × $0.50/MTok = $18.50
- Output: ~18.5M tokens × $2.50/MTok = $46.25
- **Total: ~$64.75 for 10,000 requests**

## Token Counting

1 token ≈ 4 characters ≈ 0.75 words (English). Use `POST /v1/messages/count_tokens` to count tokens before sending.

## Billing

- Monthly billing based on actual usage
- Credit card or invoicing
- Spend limits configurable per workspace
- Usage tracked in Console → Usage page

sections.title: Per-model token pricing
sections.body: Current flagship pricing: Opus 4.6 ($5 input, $25 output per MTok), Sonnet 4.6 ($3/$15), Haiku 4.5 ($1/$5). Legacy models: Opus 4.1/4 are expensive at $15/$75. Batch API halves all prices. See [[anthropic/models]] for which model to choose based on quality needs, then use this table for cost planning.

sections.title: Prompt caching costs
sections.body: Cache writes cost 1.25x (5-minute TTL) or 2x (1-hour TTL) base input price. Cache reads cost 0.1x — 90% savings. Break-even: one cache read for 5m TTL, two for 1h. Best for repeated system prompts, tool definitions, and long documents. See [[anthropic/prompt-caching]] for implementation. Caching multipliers stack with batch discounts and data residency.

sections.title: Batch API pricing
sections.body: 50% flat discount on both input and output tokens for all models. Opus 4.6: $2.50/$12.50. Sonnet 4.6: $1.50/$7.50. Haiku 4.5: $0.50/$2.50. Prompt caching discounts stack on top. Processing within 24 hours. See [[anthropic/batch]] for implementation.

sections.title: Tool use and server tool costs
sections.body: Client-side tools: standard token pricing plus system prompt overhead (~346 tokens for auto/none, ~313 for any/tool). Web search: $10/1000 searches. Code execution: $0.05/hr per container with 1,550 free hours/month. Web fetch: free (tokens only). Bash: 245 extra tokens. Text editor: 700 extra tokens.

related.note: Choose model based on capability needs, then check pricing
Caching provides 90% savings on repeated input

author: dojo-community
